hero.title: Virtual try-on that reduces returns and increases conversion.
hero.lead: TRYONYOU helps fashion retailers show the right fit on the customer's real body through a digital twin, precise sizing intelligence and realistic garment simulation.

problem.title: The problem
problem.body: Every failed purchase caused by incorrect sizing erodes margin, increases logistics costs and weakens customer trust. In fashion, it is not enough to show a garment: you must help the customer understand how it will fit, what size they need and whether they can buy with confidence.
problem.closing: Most sizing experiences still rely on generic charts. TRYONYOU replaces them with individual certainty.

solution.title: The solution in 3 steps
solution.support: It is not a simple avatar. It is a decision engine for fit, sizing and garment visualization designed for enterprise retail.

steps.title: The customer creates their body profile
steps.body: From guided images and minimal data, TRYONYOU generates a precise profile to estimate measurements and fit behavior.

steps.title: TRYONYOU creates a usable digital twin
steps.body: The system transforms that information into a digital model oriented to sizing, recommendation and visualization.

steps.title: The brand shows size and fit clearly
steps.body: The retailer can recommend the right size, show how the garment falls and reduce uncertainty before purchase.

benefits.title: Key benefits

cards.title: Less doubt at the moment of purchase
cards.body: When the customer understands size and fit, the step to checkout is more likely and the PDP performs better.

cards.title: Fewer sizing errors, lower operating cost
cards.body: TRYONYOU helps reduce returns associated with fit and size choice in sensitive categories.

cards.title: A safer and more useful experience
cards.body: Personalized recommendation increases the perception of control, reduces friction and improves the relationship with the brand.

benefits.closing: The promise is not only a better experience. The promise is better unit economics per order.

technology.title: Technology
technology.body: TRYONYOU combines guided capture, body modeling, sizing intelligence and garment simulation into a single decision layer. The result is a Digital Fit Engine capable of translating visual and product data into size recommendations, fit representation and actionable signals for the retailer.
technology.pauLabel: PAU, personal AI stylist by TRYONYOU

trust.title: Proof and trust
trust.body: A sober proof block designed for internal validation and enterprise deployment.

metrics.label: Up to -85% returns and +25% conversion in validated scopes.
Architecture prepared for up to 10,000 simultaneous users.

trust.note: Do not use logos without written authorization.

finalCta.title: If your team wants to reduce returns, increase conversion and validate a pilot with a clear business case, let's talk.
finalCta.microcopy: Indicative response within 48 business hours. Meeting tailored to retail, e-commerce or department stores.

demoForm.title: Request a demo
demoForm.support: Tell us about your case and we will prepare a demo tailored to your operation, your channel and your business priority.

fieldLabels.consent: I agree to be contacted regarding my request.

demoForm.successBody: Your demo request has been sent. Our team will contact you shortly.
demoForm.error: We could not send your request right now.
demoForm.retry: Please try again in a few moments.

expansion.bannerBody: New experience points are opening their doors. The sovereign network is expanding across Paris.

principles.title: Biometric protection
principles.body: Body data never leaves the customer's device. No silhouette storage, no third-party exploitation.

principles.title: Algorithmic transparency
principles.body: Every size recommendation is traceable. The customer understands why a fit adjustment is suggested.

principles.title: Body dignity
principles.body: Zero weight commentary, zero normative projection. The engine fits the garment to the body, never the other way round.

principles.title: Data sovereignty
principles.body: The retailer receives fit signals, never raw biometric data. The customer remains the owner.

pauGuideGreeting: Hello, I am PAU, personal AI stylist by TRYONYOU.
pauGuideWelcome: Welcome to Le Bon Marché Rive Gauche, where the Hidden Pocket loyalty keeps every choice sovereign.
pauGuideScan: I guide the customer through capture and body profile creation.
pauGuideSnap: I show how the garment falls before purchase.
pauGuideNext: I help the customer decide with more clarity on size and fit.

mirror.brand_fallback: Burberry elegance as an exceptional alternative.
